reviews.comment:
En realidad tuve que cargar enfrente porque no tenían nafta y el camión estaba detrás mio pero la chica que me atendió con mucha onda intentó llevarme a otro surtidor pero el tránsito era mucho.

(Translated by Google)
I actually had to load up front because they were out of gas and the truck was behind me, but the girl who helped me was very friendly and tried to take me to another pump, but there was a lot of traffic.
